main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'no-wetted con propilenglicol residual' matches anchors

key_signals.justification: C2: cites 6+ signals: caudal 36%, dP low, P 64, cond 480, PG 20% 5 meses, aclarado 30min

alternatives.justification: C3: 3 alts (aire/aclarado, compactacion, biofouling) all with rationale

recommended_action.justification: C4: rehidratacion ok pero plantea CIP NaOH pH11.5-12 si no recupera (recoverable risk)

requested_data.justification: C5: 1 anchor (PG/COT en permeado), no fabricante consult

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: PG indistinguible alimentacion + reversion -> daño estructural

automatic_fails_triggered.reference: Aplicar CIP ácido o alcalino antes de completar el wetting
automatic_fails_triggered.justification: CIP NaOH+EDTA propuesto si tras 48h no se alcanza 95% caudal

reviewer_notes: Claude conflict; CIP condicional similar a opus-4-6
